---
title: "World Bank Pink Sheet Indices"
format: html
---

This site publishes the latest processed World Bank Pink Sheet market index visualization generated by the repository pipeline.

_Last updated: {{< meta date-modified >}}_

![](assets/plots/pink_sheet_indices.png){fig-alt="Time-series plot of selected Pink Sheet indices for Energy, Cereals, Oils and Meals, and Fertilizers."}
